summary: CV Family & Schooling census — discovery fan-out (geo×subcategory cells, Sonnet workers)
logs: Batch 0: 8 discovery cells (Sonnet 4.6 workers, ~3-4 searches each)...
Batch 0 complete: 8/8 cells returned, 147 raw candidates. Spend so far: 177k tokens
